# AIDreamLab

> AI-powered photo, video, and avatar generation. Turn one photo into face swaps, talking portraits, videos, and more.

AIDreamLab lets people upload a single photo and generate face swaps, AI avatars, talking portraits, and short videos.

## Key facts
- Try a generation for free, no signup or credit card required
- Paid plans start with a 5-day trial and 3,000 bonus credits
- Tools: face swap, image restyle, image-to-video, AI avatar chat, text-to-speech (coming soon)
